known_issues.title: AC compressor failure
known_issues.description: The AC compressor clutch can wear prematurely, leading to loss of cooling and a chirping noise on startup.
known_issues.symptoms: AC blows warm air, a chirping or squealing noise from the compressor on startup, and the AC clutch not engaging when the AC button is pressed.
known_issues.recommendation: Test AC thoroughly on a hot day before buying.

known_issues.title: Infotainment screen freezing
known_issues.description: The touchscreen unit can freeze or reboot randomly, requiring a software update or unit replacement.
known_issues.symptoms: The touchscreen goes black or freezes mid-use and occasionally reboots on its own, temporarily disabling the backup camera and radio.
known_issues.recommendation: Cycle through radio, backup camera, and Bluetooth to confirm the screen is responsive.

known_issues.title: CVT shudder
known_issues.description: Some CVT-equipped cars develop a shudder under light acceleration as the transmission ages.
known_issues.symptoms: A vibration or shudder felt through the pedal and floor during light throttle acceleration, most noticeable between 30 and 50 km/h.
known_issues.recommendation: Test drive at highway speed and light throttle, feeling for vibration.

known_issues.title: Paint chipping on hood
known_issues.description: Factory clear coat on early builds is prone to chipping on the hood and front fenders.
known_issues.symptoms: Small chips or flaking in the clear coat on the hood and front fenders, visible as dull or rough patches in direct sunlight.
known_issues.recommendation: Inspect the hood and fenders closely in direct sunlight.

known_issues.title: Excessive oil consumption
known_issues.description: Some engines burn oil faster than normal between changes, especially on highway-heavy cars.
known_issues.symptoms: The low oil warning light appearing between scheduled changes, or a noticeably low dipstick reading despite no visible leaks.
known_issues.recommendation: Ask for oil consumption history and check the dipstick before a long test drive.

known_issues.title: Automatic transmission hesitation
known_issues.description: A brief hesitation or shudder can occur during low-speed shifts.
known_issues.symptoms: A momentary pause or jerk when shifting between 1st and 2nd gear at low speed, most noticeable in stop-and-go traffic.
known_issues.recommendation: Test drive through stop-and-go conditions, not just highway.

known_issues.title: Rear suspension wear
known_issues.description: Rear trailing arm bushings wear out, causing a knocking noise over bumps.
known_issues.symptoms: A knocking or clunking noise from the rear of the car over bumps and potholes, sometimes with slightly looser rear-end handling.
known_issues.recommendation: Listen for clunks over speed bumps during the test drive.

known_issues.title: Fuel dilution in oil
known_issues.description: Cold climates and short trips can cause gasoline to dilute engine oil on 1.5T engines, especially early production years.
known_issues.symptoms: A gasoline smell on the dipstick, an oil level reading higher than expected, or a fuel dilution warning message on the dash.
known_issues.recommendation: Ask about oil change intervals and whether the dealer performed the fuel dilution reflash update.

known_issues.title: Infotainment lag
known_issues.description: The touchscreen can be slow to respond, particularly with Apple CarPlay connected.
known_issues.symptoms: Noticeable delay between touching the screen and the display responding, most apparent when CarPlay is active.
known_issues.recommendation: Connect a phone via CarPlay during the test drive to check responsiveness.

known_issues.title: Road noise from tires
known_issues.description: Factory all-season tires wear unevenly and become noisy, often mistaken for a mechanical issue.
known_issues.symptoms: A humming or droning noise at highway speed that rises and falls with road surface, and visible uneven tread wear on inspection.
known_issues.recommendation: Check tread depth and wear pattern on all four tires.

generations.label: 5th Gen
generations.common_competitors: Toyota RAV4, Mazda CX-5, Nissan Rogue

known_issues.title: Fuel dilution in oil
known_issues.description: The 1.5L turbo engine is prone to gasoline diluting the oil in cold climates, especially on short trips.
known_issues.symptoms: A gasoline odor on the dipstick, an oil level that appears to rise between changes, or a fuel dilution alert on the instrument cluster.
known_issues.recommendation: Ask if the ECU fuel dilution update was performed and check oil condition on the dipstick.

known_issues.title: AC condenser corrosion
known_issues.description: Road salt exposure can corrode the AC condenser, causing refrigerant leaks.
known_issues.symptoms: AC that cools poorly or stops cooling altogether, sometimes with visible oily residue on the condenser fins at the front of the vehicle.
known_issues.recommendation: Run the AC on max cold for several minutes to confirm it holds temperature.

known_issues.title: Infotainment screen glitches
known_issues.description: The touchscreen can freeze or show a black screen intermittently.
known_issues.symptoms: The screen going blank or unresponsive at random, sometimes taking the backup camera feed down with it.
known_issues.recommendation: Test the backup camera and touchscreen response during the test drive.
